title: Idaho Falls, ID — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Idaho Falls, ID: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Idaho Falls is a city in ID with a population of 62,000. Eastern Idaho city on the Snake River near Yellowstone with a strong nuclear research sector.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
